understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on the grid by navigating through safe tiles while avoiding spike hazards (`u`/`v`). Complete levels efficiently within the 50-turn/2-attempt budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement via MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT is horizontal only; afterward, gravity automatically pulls the player in the current gravity direction (DOWN = lower y, UP = higher y) until landing on a solid tile, hazard, or goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) at the target position to open fall paths. Landing on spikes ends the run. UNDO reverts the last action. The state provides landing previews and corridor scans to plan safe passages.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on the grid by navigating through safe tiles while avoiding spike hazards (`u`/`v`). Complete levels efficiently within the 50-turn/2-attempt budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement via MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT is horizontal only; afterward, gravity automatically pulls the player in the current gravity direction (DOWN = lower y, UP = higher y) until landing on a solid tile, hazard, or goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) at the target position to open fall paths. Landing on spikes ends the run. UNDO reverts the last action. The state provides landing previews and corridor scans to plan safe passages.
